title: 3PCS 30" Artificial Autumn Leaves Branches Artificial Aspen Leaf Faux Fall Leaf Long Stems Fake Autumn Foliage Fake Plants Dark Red Leaves Spray for Vase Table Centerpieces Home Cottage Decor
features: HARVEST LEAF SPRAYS: Once the summer fades into fall, the aspen leaf takes on its beloved autumn appearance. Golden yellow and distinctively shaped, these broadleaf beauties are an inventive way to add color to an arrangement with a subtle hint of fall.

REALISTIC DESIGN: The attractive gradient color leaves spray measures 32 inches tall, these artificial leaf sprays mimic the appearance of natural foliage with intricate details and lifelike textures.This lifelike maple branch is filled with rich fall mustard tone, creating the perfect autumn stem.

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: Artificial aspen stems are made of plastic with wire inside, flexible and easy to shape, you can bend the branches to make the bouquet look bigger and fuller. Autumn plant leaves decorations made of high-quality silk fabric are firmly strung on the branches, durable, and and require minimal maintenance.

VERSATILE DECORATIVE ACCENT: Styling natural-looking faux autumn branches in statement vases is a simple and sophisticated way to elevate your fall home decor. Our artificial aspen leaves are a must-have for your seasonal decor, adding a touch of nature's splendor to any space. Whether you're looking to create an eye-catching centerpiece, craft a wreath, or enhance your floral arrangements, or style a handful of stems in a vessel, this versatile leaf stem will effortlessly elevate your designs.

CREATE FESTIVE DISPLAYS: Arborus offers only premium quality artificial fall stems, branches, picks, wreaths and garlands. We’ve carefully curated our collection of hyper-realistic, stunning botanicals to compliment your interior design. Find more inspirations for decorating home, office, party, or events during the autumn season in our shop.
